title: trichinium spicatum
intro: Trichinium spicatum, also known as the thorny club moss, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant belonging to the class Lycopodiopsida. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Trichinium spicatum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Trichinium spicatum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
